message:
🌱 Add n8n: PDF parsing broken in version 1.97.1 and up mission (#1440)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "n8n-16281-pdf-parsing-broken-in-version-1-97-1-and-up",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "n8n: PDF parsing broken in version 1.97.1 and up",
+    "description": "PDF parsing broken in version 1.97.1 and up. This issue affects 9+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify n8n troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your n8n deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n -n n8n --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review n8n configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant n8n configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n\nkubectl get configmap -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=n8n\n```\n### Bug Description\n\nI'm experiencing an issue when attempting to parse the PDF file (email attachment) using the `Extract From File` node to convert it to text, I get a `DOMMatrix is not defined` error."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for PDF parsing broken in version 1.97.1 and up",
+        "description": "Hi there 👋\n\nI’m running into the exact same issue as described in issue #16281. I started using n8n for the first time, eager to follow along with tutorials, and immediately hit this “DOMMatrix is not defined” error when using the **Extract From File** node on PDFs (using Docker images version\n```yaml\njq 'del(.pnpm.patchedDependencies)' package.json > package.json.tmp; mv package.json.tmp package.json\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade n8n to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade n8n:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade n8n n8n/n8n --namespace n8n\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n n8n\nhelm list -n n8n\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm PDF parsing broken in version 1.97.1 and up is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n -n n8n --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n n8n --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Hi there 👋\n\nI’m running into the exact same issue as described in issue #16281. I started using n8n for the first time, eager to follow along with tutorials, and immediately hit this “DOMMatrix is not defined” error when using the **Extract From File** node on PDFs (using Docker images version 1.97.1+).",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "jq 'del(.pnpm.patchedDependencies)' package.json > package.json.tmp; mv package.json.tmp package.json"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {

+      "n8n",
+      "community",

+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
